Web search confirms Emoncms is real open-source energy monitoring application at https://github.com/emoncms/emoncms

privileged_info_summary: The task targets Emoncms (https://emoncms.org/), a real open-source energy monitoring application. Data is synthetic, generated via PHPFina binary format with 30 days of historical data. Admin credentials are admin/admin. The Solar PV feed is created as a PHPFina feed with 10-second intervals, Watts unit, and solar tag, with synthetic data following realistic solar generation patterns (peak 2550W at midday, 0 during night hours). The Graph module (https://github.com/emoncms/graph) is a standard visualization component of Emoncms that allows users to add feeds and visualize data over time.
